pr.title: Record: AR Self-Gen GPTQ + XSA-all + BigramHash 3072×112 — val_bpb 1.11473 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Full-Hessian GPTQ calibrates on autoregressively self-generated text combined with XSA-all and a 3072×112 BigramHash under 16MB.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Quantization uses autoregressively self-generated calibration data without touching validation shards, so it is not val-only training.
techniques: Full Hessian GPTQ with AR self-generated calibration
XSA applied across all 11 layers for cross-position mixing
BigramHash widened to 3072×112 within the 16MB cap
